# This test demonstrates a simple multi-region deployment where each region has
# identical per-node CPU capacity, and span config constraints keep each half of
# the keyspace in a single region. With symmetric load, MMA's absolute CPU
# balancing should produce even CPU utilization across all stores.
gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b) nodes_per_region=(3,3) node_cpu_cores=8
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

gen_ranges ranges=60 min_key=0 max_key=10000 placement_type=even
----

set_span_config
[0,5000): num_replicas=3 num_voters=3 constraints={'+region=a':3} lease_preferences=[['+region=a']]
[5000,10000): num_replicas=3 num_voters=3 constraints={'+region=b':3} lease_preferences=[['+region=b']]
----

gen_load rate=6000 rw_ratio=0.95 min_block=128 max_block=128 request_cpu_per_access=1000000 raft_cpu_per_write=200000 min_key=0 max_key=5000
----
6.00 access-vcpus, 0.06 raft-vcpus, 38 KiB/s goodput

gen_load rate=6000 rw_ratio=0.95 min_block=128 max_block=128 request_cpu_per_access=1000000 raft_cpu_per_write=200000 min_key=5000 max_key=10000
----
6.00 access-vcpus, 0.06 raft-vcpus, 38 KiB/s goodput

assertion type=conformance violating=0
----

assertion type=balance stat=cpu upper_bound=1.15 ticks=6
----
asserting: max_{stores}(cpu)/mean_{stores}(cpu) ≤ 1.15 at each of last 6 ticks

eval duration=8m samples=1 seed=42 cfgs=(mma-count) metrics=(cpu,cpu_util,replicas,leases)
----
cpu#1: last:  [s1=2075236477, s2=2250465357, s3=1852949683, s4=2226420221, s5=2052839696, s6=1900361312] (stddev=148666298.36, mean=2059712124.33, sum=12358272746)

replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=262%, s2=320%, s3=242%, s4=282%, s5=260%, s6=202%]  (sum=1568%)
